---
title: "Week 5"
subtitle: "TBA"
editor: visual
---

::: callout-important
-   Peer Review Due - Wed. July 22
:::

## Prepare

📖 Read [CH.6 in ModernDive](https://moderndive.com/v2/multiple-regression.html), but ignore the stuff on interactions

📖 Read [Chapter 9 in ModernDive](https://moderndive.com/v2/hypothesis-testing.html)

## Lectures

🖥️ [Lecture 13 - Hypothesis testing I](not-available-lec.html)

🖥️ [Lecture 14 - Hypothesis Testing II](not-avaliable-lec.html)

🖥️ [Lecture 15 - Prediction](not-avaliable-lec.html)

## Participation

📋

## Lab

⌨️ [Lab 5 - Hypothesis Testing and Prediction](not-available.html)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
